items.title: Gate Night
items.description: Open practice on the Pro Gate. Great for working on starts, getting track time and meeting other riders. AusCycling membership required — any club, any track. Canteen open.

items.title: Coaching Nights
items.description: Three nights of structured coaching across all levels — Mini Wheelers, Beginners, Intermediates and Advanced. Book week-to-week through EntryBoss. AusCycling membership required.

items.title: Race Days
items.description: From small club races (1.5-2hr) to big State and National events with 400+ riders. Perfect for first-timers and seasoned racers. Watch our socials for upcoming dates.
